---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new plugin, command, or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see implemented. Include:
- Which plugin or command this affects (or if it's a new plugin)
- What the CLI interface would look like
- Any relevant flags or configuration

## Example usage

```sh
# How would you invoke this feature?
exalm <plugin> <subcommand> --flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

References, links to similar tools, screenshots, etc.
